hero.subtitle: Technology with human judgment
hero.description: This site brings together ideas, processes, and work focused on creating products with meaning.

built.title: Things I've built
built.p1: I'm the creator of <zanto>Zanto</zanto>, a clothing brand founded in 2013 together with my brother <gustavo>Gustavo</gustavo>, built around a precise balance between formal and informal. I've been involved in the creation and development of <ness>Ness Digital</ness>, a SaaS focused on centralized management and process optimization in the healthcare sector, prioritizing patient care and safety.
built.p2: I currently work as Operations Manager at <biotissue>BioTissue Colombia</biotissue>, where I focus on continuous improvement across processes, logistics, and operations.
built.p3: I've built digital projects using <nextjs>Next.js</nextjs>, like <neuronahub>NeuronaHub</neuronahub>, a strategic professional growth ecosystem. Also using <astro>Astro</astro>, I built the website for <jhonny>Jhonny Aponza</jhonny>, a motivational speaker.
built.p4: Using <framer>Framer</framer>, I developed the website for <derwins>DER'S Roofing</derwins>, with a strong focus on clarity, performance, and simplicity.
built.p5: With <html>HTML</html>, <css>CSS</css>, and <js>JavaScript</js>, I built the website for <zap>ZAP Blinds Solutions</zap>, a company dedicated to installing all kinds of blinds.

thinking.title: How I think
thinking.p1: I believe in making the world better through analysis, optimization, and the responsible use of technology and AI 🧠. Creating —when done with meaning— gives purpose to our existence in this new era. We have only one opportunity, and it's worth using it to generate positive impact in others through meaning and identity.
thinking.p2: I move between design, development, and problem-solving, with a clear orientation toward human service. I mainly work with tools like <cursor>Cursor</cursor>, <supabase>Supabase</supabase>, and <vercel>Vercel</vercel>. I use <figma>Figma</figma> and <illustrator>Adobe Illustrator</illustrator> to design and prototype ideas.
thinking.p3: I'm interested in creating products that are honest, simple, useful, and elegant. I work with transparency, discipline, and enthusiasm, making sure each project delivers real value to people and businesses.
thinking.p4: I believe that meaningful contributions often start by solving small problems well.
thinking.p5: If you have a product in mind or one that needs improvement, <email>reach out</email> or <cal>schedule a call</cal> — I'd love to talk about it.
thinking.p6: Thank you for reading this far.
